name: MacKenzie Realty Capital, Inc.
business: The company is a real estate investment trust that acquires and operates real estate assets, primarily commercial and residential properties, and also invests in illiquid or non-traded debt and equity securities of real estate companies. It generates revenue by leasing office space and apartment units to tenants.
sellsTo: Investors (through public offerings of common and preferred stock)

exposures.sentence: In addition to our commercial and residential real estate properties, we own two parcels of land: a vacant parcel adjacent to the 220 Campus Lane Office Building in Fairfield, California ( Campus Lane Land ) and a vacant parcel at 5000 Wiseman Way in Fairfield, California ( Aurora Land ).
We are actively constructing a multi-family residential community on this land which will include 72 units in three buildings, and a club house.

catalysts.event: Completion of first residential building at Aurora at Green Valley
catalysts.sentence: The first residential building was completed in July 2025, with leasing commencing in August 2025.

catalysts.event: Completion of remaining two buildings at Aurora at Green Valley
catalysts.sentence: The remaining two buildings were completed in September 2025, with leasing expected to commence shortly thereafter.

catalysts.event: Target construction start for Blue Ridge development
catalysts.sentence: Our goal is to commence construction in spring 2026; however, this is subject to the city's approval of our development application submitted in April 2024 and to securing the necessary financial resources.
